matches.x: Zs CHAPTER XXII. epee resort unto David—He commendhis parents unto the king of Moab— Stee Make eee fe ar esca eth David the news, ik Hee therefore departed thence, . and escaped to the cave Adullam ; and when his brethren and all his father’s house heard it, they went down thither to him.
